settings.title: From a brand about paper, to a brand about taking a pause.
settings.body:
MD Paper, a single sheet of paper created in the 1960s, marks the origin of MD PRODUCT. After years of working closely with this paper, we eventually realized the essential value inherent in the act of "writing." That value lies in the precious time spent facing oneself: arranging one's thoughts and expressing an honest and genuine sensibility. We call this moment "Yohaku."

Our desire is to expand the experience of creating this Yohaku, a margin in time, not just on the surface of paper, but into our spaces, our days, and our lives themselves.
settings.image_alt: MD Product calendar with hands writing

settings.title: Like picking up a rock & start coloring.
settings.body:
Each Studio Unto Color Gem is produced with natural materials such as burnt chalk, apple, stones and granite.

Using the Color Gems is a process similar to rock erosion: every line you draw and every indentation you press into it slowly transforms the crayon cube, turning the natural process of erosion into an artistic footprint.
settings.image_alt: Studio Unto Color Gem drawing a line

settings.title: A pen that doesn't get in the way of writing.
settings.body:
Born from Nitto Denko's adhesive technology, Stálogy makes tools for the discipline of writing every day. Quiet objects, considered details, no decoration.

The 027 water-based gel ink ball point pen pairs a non-slip grip with a low-resistance tip — the kind of pen you stop noticing the moment you start using it.
settings.image_alt: Stálogy 027 gel pen writing on a small notepad

settings.title: The incense of Awaji Island & the matches of Harima.
settings.body:
These two traditional industries of Hyogo Prefecture first encountered each other in 2011. The collaboration started with the idea of an incense that could be lit like striking a match.

The brand name hibi means "day to day," or daily, in Japanese. It was given with the hope that you would keep it around you every day and freely enjoy its fragrance.
settings.image_alt: Hibi match incense in box on wooden table

settings.title: Building a brand portfolio that speaks the language of good design.
settings.body:
Based in Amsterdam, Misc.distribution has been distributing Midori since 2010 and we have been carefully building our brand portfolio since.

At first glance it may seem as though Japanese brands are our forte, but it is aesthetics that draws us in. It just so happens we frequently seem to find this in Japan, but Studio Unto from Taiwan and BLOCK from our hometown are testimony to our worldwide interest in nice brands.
